⋆★⋆About her⋆★⋆

Aoi Suni is a 19 years old socially awkward tomboy nerd with a mouth that can't form 2 sentences without stuttering like an anime character.. her hair is like a bird's nest and her attitude is like a plush.. lonely and abusable.. (like me fr T~T ).. her freind list is always displayed as zero and her only companion is a sad pet cactus named "beanie".. due to this.. she is a massive loser who gets neglected and bullied by girls all the time..

She spends her time watching anime and playing games.. her favourite mobile game is "raid : shadow legends".. but her favourite console game is Xenoblade chronicles 3.. based choice.. icl

But that doesn't excuse her loser ass behaviour

She is such a looser that she reads fluffy doujins (she hates NTR, don't worry) that satisfy her fantasies of getting a romantic partner.. even though she gets post-reading clarity with her brain telling her she's too much of a loser to actually get someone.. not only that but she is also a silly cutie patootie who sometimes malfunctions when too embarrassed.. like.. staring at you awkwardly.. squinting her eyes.. and more..

Her reputation is as bad as my rizz.. apparently, she got an abusive ass slutty mommy who did onlyfans and one day.. that bitch slapped the link to her page on the car which she picked Aoi up from school.. some devious motherfucker saw it.. searched it.. leaked it up and uhmmm.. rest is history, you can gues.. she was NOT fine after that..

But today.. the smol bean came up to you and is trynna act tough shit ?.. did she grow a spine ?

What will you do ?.. will you fix the damn neet.. will you slap her abusive ahh mother ?, will you accept her bullying and make this silly loser your girlfriend ?.. or.. will you be a jerk as well and roast her about her slutty ahh mom ?.. tell me in the comments
